title: Backend: load and paginate events for an issue
description:
As an API consumer viewing an issue, I want to retrieve that issue’s events with predictable paging, so that the UI can show timelines without indexing.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Backend scans project/events/*.json, filters by issue_id, orders by filename/timestamp.
- Supports pagination and/or time-window parameters to bound IO.
- No alternate storage or indexing; file scan is the single path.
- Returns event list with event-specific payloads intact.
creator: ryan

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed: console backend now scans event files and exposes GET /api/issues/:id/events (and multi-tenant path) with limit/before cursor, returning {issue_id, events, next_before}.
